widget.name: SpacioArte ERP
widget.short_description: Bridge Kommo cards with SpacioArte ERP invoices, quotes, and order tracking.
widget.description: Use this widget to match the current Kommo lead or contact with the ERP, sync it, review quotes and invoices, search order status, and open WhatsApp invoice sharing links.
widget.tour_description: Connect Kommo cards with the ERP to surface billing and production data in one place.
